data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for governance mode and visibility controls.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the governance mode and visibility controls, but the evidence provided does not include any references or confirmations of these specific controls being implemented or operational within the saga run. The linked use case mentions the need for governance mode and visibility controls, but without concrete evidence of their existence or functionality, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of governance mode and visibility controls.
